---
title: "making_autodock_boxplot_chelators"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Set project directory (NEW PATH YOU GAVE)
project_dir <- here("Docking", "AutoDockVina",
                    "chelating_groups",
                    "autodock_pdbqt_outputs")

# List all pdbqt files
all_files <- list.files(project_dir,
                         pattern = "\\.pdbqt$",
                         full.names = TRUE)

# protein prefix
protein_name <- "paLpxH"

# =========================
# FUNCTION: extract Vina score
# =========================
get_score <- function(f) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  line <- grep("^REMARK VINA RESULT", lines, value = TRUE)[1]
  if (!is.na(line)) {
    as.numeric(strsplit(line, "\\s+")[[1]][4])
  } else {
    NA
  }
}

# =========================
# BUILD RESULTS TABLE (UPDATED PARSING)
# =========================
results <- tibble(
  file = all_files,
  basename = basename(all_files),

  # extract chelating group
  Group = str_extract(basename(all_files),
                      "(carboxylate|hydroxamate|phenolate|phosphate|phosphonate)group") |>
          str_remove("group"),

  # extract repeat number (1–10)
  Repeat = as.integer(str_extract(basename(all_files), "(?<=group_)\\d+")),

  # extract docking score
  Score = map_dbl(all_files, get_score)
)

# convert to factors
results$Group <- as.factor(results$Group)
results$Repeat <- as.factor(results$Repeat)

# =========================
# BOXPLOT (same style as your original)
# =========================
binding_boxplot <- ggplot(results, aes(x = Group, y = Score, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "AutoDock Vina predicted binding affinities across chelating groups",
    x = "Chelating group",
    y = "Affinity (kcal/mol)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

show(binding_boxplot)
```

```{r}
#old code
#correct 18th april even tho 7th april did do it ut mb didnt save idk
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Set a reproducible relative path to your project folder
project_dir <- here("Docking", "AutoDockVina",
                    "chelating_groups",
                    "autodock_pdbqt_outputs")

all_files <- list.files(project_dir,
                         pattern = "\\.pdbqt$",
                         full.names = TRUE)

# protein prefix
protein_name <- "paLpxH"


# 2) function to extract Vina score
get_score <- function(f) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  line <- grep("^REMARK VINA RESULT", lines, value = TRUE)[1]
  if (!is.na(line)) as.numeric(strsplit(line, "\\s+")[[1]][4]) else NA
}

# 3) build results table
results <- tibble(
  file = all_files,
  basename = basename(all_files),
  
  Group = str_match(basename(all_files),
                    "paLpxH_([a-z]+group)_\\d+\\.pdbqt")[,2],
  
  Repeat = as.integer(str_match(basename(all_files),
                    "paLpxH_[a-z]+group_(\\d+)\\.pdbqt")[,2]),
  
  Score = map_dbl(all_files, get_score)
)
#convert tails to factor
results$Tail <- as.factor(results$Tail)
# 4) plot
results$Group <- as.factor(results$Group)
results$Repeat <- as.factor(results$Repeat)

ggplot(results, aes(x = Repeat, y = Score, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Binding affinities per docking repeat",
    x = "Repeat (1–10)",
    y = "Affinity (kcal/mol)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)
```
